title: AN ACT AMENDING A CERTAIN ITEM UNDER APPENDIX B OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4073 / 57 OG No. 12, 2108 (March 20, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2878, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT AMENDING A CERTAIN ITEM UNDER APPENDIX B OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Priority No. 39, page 77-B, under "Pangasinan III," Appendix B of Republic Act Numbered Sixteen hundred thirteen is amended to read as follows:

"39. Sta. Barbara Sonquil Repair

and Improvement........................ P2,500.00."

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
